glosses.es: lo más … posible; si es posible
glosses.vi: càng … càng tốt; nếu có thể
glosses.hi: जितना संभव हो …; यदि संभव हो
glosses.ro: cât mai … posibil; dacă este posibil
glosses.ja: できるだけ…; できれば

translations.en: I’ll head out as early as possible.
translations.es: Voy a salir lo más temprano posible.
translations.fr: Je partirai le plus tôt possible.
translations.ru: Я постараюсь выехать как можно раньше.
translations.pt: Vou sair o mais cedo possível.
translations.vi: Tôi sẽ đi sớm nhất có thể.
translations.nl: Ik ga zo vroeg mogelijk weg.
translations.hi: मैं जितना संभव हो उतना जल्दी निकलूँगा।
translations.el: Θα φύγω όσο πιο νωρίς γίνεται.
translations.nb: Jeg drar så tidlig som mulig.
translations.sv: Jag åker så tidigt som möjligt.
translations.ro: Voi pleca cât de devreme posibil.
translations.da: Jeg tager afsted så tidligt som muligt.
translations.ja: できるだけ早く出発します。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun in nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite verb (1st person singular, present); part of the separable verb 'losfahren' with the particle 'los'.
Degree adverb meaning 'as ... as possible' or 'preferably'; intensifies the following temporal adverb.
Temporal adverb specifying the time (early).
Separable verb particle of 'losfahren'; placed clause-final in the main clause.

sentences.target: Wir nehmen möglichst wenig Gepäck mit.

translations.de: Wir nehmen möglichst wenig Gepäck mit.
translations.en: We’re taking as little luggage as possible.
translations.es: Vamos a llevar el mínimo de equipaje posible.
translations.fr: On prend le moins de bagages possible.
translations.yue: 我哋會盡量帶最少嘅行李。
translations.ru: Мы возьмём как можно меньше багажа.
translations.pt: Vamos levar o mínimo de bagagem possível.
translations.tr: Yanımıza mümkün olduğunca az eşya alacağız.
translations.vi: Bọn mình mang càng ít hành lý càng tốt.
translations.ar: سنأخذ أقل قدر ممكن من الأمتعة.
translations.nl: We nemen zo min mogelijk bagage mee.
translations.hi: हम जितना संभव हो उतना कम सामान लेकर जाएँगे।
translations.el: Θα πάρουμε όσο το δυνατόν λιγότερες αποσκευές.
translations.nb: Vi tar med oss så lite bagasje som mulig.
translations.id: Kami akan membawa barang bawaan sesedikit mungkin.
translations.sv: Vi tar med så lite bagage som möjligt.
translations.da: Vi tager så lidt bagage med som muligt.
translations.ja: 荷物はできるだけ少なくしていきます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun in nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite verb (1st person plural, present); part of the separable verb 'mitnehmen' with the particle 'mit'.
Degree adverb 'as ... as possible'; here intensifies the quantity expressed by 'wenig'.
Quantifying determiner modifying the mass noun 'Gepäck' (indefinite small amount).
Common mass noun; direct object of 'nehmen'.
Separable verb particle of 'mitnehmen'; surfaces clause-final in the main clause.

sentences.target: Die Lehrerin erklärt es möglichst einfach.

translations.de: Die Lehrerin erklärt es möglichst einfach.
translations.en: The teacher explains it as simply as possible.
translations.es: La profesora lo explica de la forma más sencilla posible.
translations.fr: La prof l'explique le plus simplement possible.
translations.it: L'insegnante lo spiega nel modo più semplice possibile.
translations.zh-Hans: 老师尽量把它讲得很简单。
translations.yue: 老師盡量用最簡單嘅方式解釋。
translations.ru: Учительница объясняет это как можно проще.
translations.pt: A professora explica da forma mais simples possível.
translations.he: המורה מסבירה את זה בצורה הכי פשוטה שאפשר.
translations.tr: Öğretmen bunu olabildiğince basit bir şekilde anlatıyor.
translations.vi: Cô giáo giải thích theo cách đơn giản nhất có thể.
translations.ar: المعلمة تشرح ذلك بأبسط طريقة ممكنة.
translations.nl: De leraes legt het zo eenvoudig mogelijk uit.
translations.hu: A tanárnő a lehető legegyszerűbben magyarázza el.
translations.hi: अध्यापिका इसे जितना संभव हो उतना सरल तरीके से समझाती हैं।
translations.el: Η δασκάλα το εξηγεί όσο πιο απλά γίνεται.
translations.nb: Læreren forklarer det så enkelt som mulig.
translations.sv: Läraren förklarar det så enkelt som möjligt.
translations.da: Læreren forklarer det så enkelt som muligt.
translations.ja: 先生はそれをできるだけわかりやすく説明します。

tokens.explanation: Definite article marking the following noun as definite; forms the subject NP.
Common noun denoting a female teacher; grammatical subject of the clause.
Finite verb (3rd person singular, present); transitive 'erklären' taking 'es' as object; modified by a manner adverbial.
Personal pronoun functioning as direct object (neuter).
Degree adverb intensifying the following manner word.
Manner adverb meaning 'simply'; modifies the verb phrase ('erklärt').

sentences.target: Ich melde mich möglichst noch heute.

translations.de: Ich melde mich möglichst noch heute.
translations.en: I’ll get back to you today if possible.
translations.fr: Je te recontacte aujourd'hui si possible.
translations.zh-Hans: 如果可以，我今天就回复你。
translations.yue: 如果可以，我今日會覆你。
translations.ru: Если получится, я отвечу вам сегодня.
translations.pt: Se possível, eu te respondo hoje.
translations.vi: Nếu được, mình sẽ trả lời bạn hôm nay.
translations.nl: Als het kan, reageer ik vandaag nog.
translations.hi: अगर हो सका तो मैं आज ही आपको जवाब दूँगा।
translations.pl: Jeśli się da, odezwę się jeszcze dziś.
translations.el: Αν γίνεται, θα σου απαντήσω σήμερα.
translations.nb: Hvis jeg kan, svarer jeg i dag.
translations.id: Kalau bisa, aku akan membalas hari ini.
translations.sv: Om möjligt hör jag av mig idag.
translations.ro: Dacă se poate, îți răspund azi.
translations.cs: Když to půjde, ozvu se jeszcze dnes.
translations.da: Hvis det er muligt, vender jeg tilbage i dag.
translations.ja: 可能なら今日中に返事します。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun in nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite verb (1st person singular, present); used reflexively with 'mich' ('sich melden' = to get in touch/report oneself).
Reflexive personal pronoun (accusative); forms the reflexive construction with 'melde'.
Degree adverb 'as ... as possible'; here modifies the temporal phrase.
Temporal/focus adverb; in the collocation 'noch heute' emphasizes 'today' (by/within today).
Temporal adverb specifying the day.
